rulings.Case Title: VICENTE CORTES VS. CURBSIDE TOO LLC et al

rulings.Case Title: FAWZI ZEIDAN VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Bank Of America'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 16, 2010, line 9. Defendant Bank Of America's Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint. Complaint not time-barred on its face. Demurrer overruled as to 1st cause of action (negligence) as an alternative theory to breach of contract. (Plaintiff may amend the first cause of action to show defendant had a duty to plaintiff independent of the contract if he chooses.) Demurrer overruled as to 4th cause of action (tort of another). Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action (breach of contract.) Plaintiff must show he is a member of class the contract is explicitly intended to benefit and therefore a 3rd party beneficiary. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to 3rd cause of action (fraud) for plaintiff to plead facts suggesting defendant's agent had scienter or intent to decieve. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CBS OUTDOOR INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. MARK RUTHERFORD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Limited Discovery Pending Motion To Strike & Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 16, 2010, line 7. DEFENDANT MARK RUTHERFORD'S Motion For Limited Discovery Pending Motion To Strike & Demurrer. Granted. Documents and verifications were not provided on the date they were due. The documents directy relate to the anti-SLAPP motion that was filed on a cross-complaint. =(302/CWW)
